focus_area: PKCE callback fix shipped (PR #22 merged as e9fc1b4). Sign-in flow end-to-end should now work: magic-link email -> /auth/callback exchanges code via @supabase/ssr cookie-writing client -> session cookie set -> redirect to /. Next session: (a) human performs live sign-in smoke test from a fresh browser; (b) pick up issue #26 (transactional setAll + fail-open alerting) as the first code follow-up because council r1 on PR #25 correctly flagged both as shipped-code bugs; (c) queue advances to framework specialist council persona (#18), Playwright nonce smoke test (#20), and first real PDF upload end-to-end. v0 vertical slice becomes usable once sign-in is confirmed.
